subcodes.first_line: Turn thy face, O Pen, unto Him Who hath been named the All-Glorious, and make mention unto Him of that which hath been sent down upon thee from Him Who cleaveth the dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ول وجهک یا قلم الی من سمی بالمجید ثم اذکره بما نزل علیک من لدن فالق الاصباح
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
